title: Fake Death Messages
description: Every 10-20 minutes, a fake death message will be sent to chat
body:
Need a server? Click [HERE](https://bisecthosting.com/kamussy) to get one 25% off!

---

If you have any complaints, comments, or suggestions, join the discord server

You DO NOT have to purchase a server, it is just recommended to ensure good server performance since essential mod has bugs and can be very laggy.


Every 10-20 minutes, a fake death message will be sent to chat for all players to see. For example:

- (player name) was slain by (another player's name)

- (player name) was slain by (obfuscated text)

If you are playing alone, one of two things will be sent to chat:

- (player name) was slain by (same player name)

- (player name) was slain by (obfuscated text)

This will repeat 5 times per world.
